# Pickup Identification

To collect an order via store pickup, the customer must present both their order number and a government-issued photo identification that matches the name on the order. Alternatively, someone else designated as an alternate pickup person can retrieve the items, provided their name is added to the order prior to collection.

[Source: store_pickup.md#pickup-identification]
